jellyfishes.name: MoonJellyfish
jellyfishes.description: 最常见的水母之一，伞部呈圆盘状，有4个马蹄形生殖腺

jellyfishes.name: BoxJellyfish
jellyfishes.description: 世界上最毒的水母之一，触须上的刺细胞含有强毒性神经毒素

jellyfishes.name: CrownJellyfish
jellyfishes.description: 伞部呈冠状，边缘有许多触手

jellyfishes.name: Jellyfish
jellyfishes.description: 可食用水母，在中国被广泛养殖

jellyfishes.name: StalkedJellyfish
jellyfishes.description: 小型水母，通常附着在海藻或岩石上
